name: two_tandoor_orders_clearly_different_clients_separ
description: Two tandoor orders, clearly different clients, separate threads
expected_output: Two separate parent tasks: Tandoor order for Client A (2 units, urgent) and Tandoor order for Client B (1 unit, quotation stage). Different clients, different quantities, different stages.
pass_criteria: PASS: Two separate parent task records, each linked to correct client. FAIL: Tasks merged into one tandoor order or cross-attributed.
challenge: Same item (tandoor) ordered by two different clients on same day. Agent must keep as two separate orders.
